description: Searches Microsoft Teams by display name (Graph GET /groups). First page: pass query. Later pages: pass odata_next_link from @odata.nextLink.

query.description: Substring for the first page only. Not used when odata_next_link is set.

odata_next_link.description: Pagination: exact @odata.nextLink string from the prior teams_search_teams response.

top.description: First-page $top (default 25). Ignored when odata_next_link is set.
